title: Accessibility Upgrade (WCAG)
description: Find and fix accessibility issues with keyboard, semantics, contrast, and focus.
author: Volt Team
template:
Perform an accessibility upgrade for {{scope}}.

Checklist:
- Keyboard navigation and visible focus
- Semantic structure and labels
- Contrast and text readability
- Error messaging and assistive announcements
- Reduced-motion safe behavior

Implement the highest-severity issues now.

Return:
- Issues by severity
- Fixes with file references
- Verification checklist

title: Agent Build Plan
description: Create a stepwise implementation plan and execute step 1 immediately.
author: Volt Team
template:
Build a plan for {{goal}} and execute Step 1 now.

Requirements:
1. Break work into 5-10 concrete steps.
2. Each step must include verification criteria.
3. Keep changes incremental and reversible.
4. Execute Step 1 after plan creation.

Output:
- Checklist plan
- Step 1 implementation details
- Verification notes

title: API Blueprint
description: Define endpoint contracts, validation, auth, and error taxonomy.
author: Volt Team
template:
Design API blueprint for {{feature_or_domain}}.

Include:
- Endpoint table (method/path/purpose)
- Request/response schemas
- Validation and authorization checks
- Error model (codes/messages/retryability)
- Versioning and backward compatibility strategy

title: Auth Hardening Checklist
description: Strengthen authentication and session controls with practical fixes.
author: Volt Team
template:
Harden auth/session logic for {{system}}.

Checklist:
- Session lifecycle and revocation
- Token handling and rotation
- Authorization boundary checks
- Account recovery and lockout policy
- Abuse protection for auth endpoints

Apply high-impact fixes and report residual risks.

title: Background Job Architecture
description: Design reliable async job pipeline with retries, idempotency, and observability.
author: Volt Team
template:
Design background processing for {{workload}}.

Must cover:
- Queue model and worker topology
- Idempotency and deduplication
- Retry/backoff + dead-letter policy
- Failure handling and replay strategy
- Metrics and alerting

title: Contract Testing Suite
description: Define and implement API contract tests to prevent provider/consumer drift.
author: Volt Team
template:
Create contract tests for {{api_boundary}}.

Do:
1. Define provider/consumer contract assumptions.
2. Add test fixtures and schema checks.
3. Implement CI checks for backward compatibility.
4. Report breaking-change risk points.

title: Conversion Copy + Implementation
description: Rewrite key landing/flow copy for conversion and apply directly in UI.
author: Volt Team
template:
Improve conversion copy for {{page_or_flow}} targeting {{audience}}.

Deliver:
- Revised headline/subheadline/CTA
- Objection-handling sections
- Clear benefit-first messaging
- Apply copy in code files

Return before/after copy and rationale.

title: Data Modeling + Schema
description: Design entity model, constraints, and seed data with migration notes.
author: Volt Team
template:
Design a robust data model for {{domain}}.

Deliver:
- Entities and relationships
- SQL schema or ORM definitions
- Constraints and indexes
- Seed data for local/dev
- Migration strategy and risks

title: Design System Starter
description: Establish design tokens + core components and apply to key screens.
author: Volt Team
template:
Create a practical design system starter for {{product_name}}.

Include:
- Tokens: color, typography, spacing, radius, elevation, motion.
- Components: button, input, card, badge, alert, modal.
- Usage rules and anti-patterns.
- Apply system to {{apply_scope}}.

Output:
- Token table
- Component contract
- Files changed and migration notes

title: Feature Spec Generator
description: Generate practical PRD with stories, acceptance criteria, and rollout plan.
author: Volt Team
template:
Create a feature specification for {{feature_name}}.

Include:
- Problem statement and goals
- Personas and use cases
- User stories + acceptance criteria
- Edge cases and failure states
- Release/rollout approach

Return as clean markdown ready for execution.

title: Flaky Bug Isolation
description: Isolate nondeterministic failures and stabilize with deterministic checks.
author: Volt Team
template:
Investigate flaky behavior: {{flaky_issue}}.

Do:
1. Build a deterministic repro harness.
2. Identify timing, shared-state, or async ordering hazards.
3. Add instrumentation logs/guards.
4. Implement stabilization fix.
5. Add regression test to lock behavior.

title: Frontend LCP + Interaction Tuning
description: Improve Core Web Vitals and interaction smoothness with concrete frontend changes.
author: Volt Team
template:
Improve frontend performance for {{page_or_flow}}.

Focus:
- Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)
- Interaction latency (INP)
- Cumulative layout shift (CLS)

Do:
1. Identify render-blocking and heavy components.
2. Optimize asset loading and code-splitting.
3. Reduce layout shifts and unnecessary re-renders.
4. Validate with measurable metrics.

title: Landing Page Experiment Pack
description: Create practical A/B experiments for headline, CTA, and section ordering.
author: Volt Team
template:
Build an experiment pack for {{landing_page}}.

Need:
- 5 A/B test hypotheses
- Variant copy + visual direction for each
- Success metric and guardrails
- Implementation notes for tracking events

title: Migration Plan Generator
description: Build low-risk migration plan with checkpoints, fallbacks, and validation.
author: Volt Team
template:
Create a migration plan for {{from_system}} -> {{to_system}}.

Plan must include:
- Preconditions and assumptions
- Incremental phases
- Data and compatibility strategy
- Rollback and fallback path
- Verification per phase

title: Onboarding + Activation Flow
description: Optimize onboarding flow to reduce drop-off and reach first-value quickly.
author: Volt Team
template:
Redesign onboarding for {{product_or_feature}} to improve activation.

Goals:
- Reduce friction in first-run experience.
- Help users reach first success in under {{target_minutes}} minutes.
- Clarify next actions after setup.

Deliver:
1. Current friction map.
2. Improved flow with UX copy updates.
3. Implement key UI changes.
4. Define activation metrics/events.

title: Performance Optimization
description: Identify bottlenecks, implement top fix, and report measurable results.
author: Volt Team
template:
Optimize {{target_area}} performance end-to-end.

Steps:
1. Capture baseline metrics (render, CPU, network, memory, startup).
2. Identify top 3 bottlenecks.
3. Implement highest-impact fix first.
4. Re-measure and compare before/after.

Output:
- Baseline table
- Bottleneck ranking
- Implemented fix
- Before/after metrics

title: Refactor for Readability
description: Improve structure and naming while preserving behavior.
author: Volt Team
template:
Refactor {{scope}} for readability and maintainability.

Rules:
- No behavior change.
- Improve naming and decomposition.
- Remove duplication safely.
- Keep public interfaces stable unless justified.

Return:
- Refactor plan
- Changes made
- Risk notes
- Behavior checks

title: Root-Cause Debugging
description: Reproduce issue, isolate root cause, and implement a regression-safe fix.
author: Volt Team
template:
Debug and fix: {{bug_description}}.

Workflow:
1. Reproduce reliably.
2. Trace call/data flow to root cause.
3. Explain why the bug occurs.
4. Implement minimal safe fix.
5. Add/adjust tests to prevent recurrence.

Return:
- Repro
- Root cause
- Fix
- Verification

title: Security Quick Audit
description: Identify critical risks and implement highest-priority security fixes.
author: Volt Team
template:
Run a security quick audit for {{scope}}.

Focus:
- Input validation/injection
- Auth/session correctness
- Secret exposure risks
- File/command execution safety
- Dependency and supply chain risk

Implement top critical findings first.

title: Test Plan + Cases
description: Build prioritized unit/integration/manual test plan and implement top tests.
author: Volt Team
template:
Create a test strategy for {{feature_or_system}}.

Include:
- Unit tests for critical logic
- Integration tests for key flows
- Manual checklist for UX and edge cases
- Regression matrix

Implement the top missing tests now.

title: UI/UX Upgrade (Premium SaaS Polish)
description: Upgrade interface quality with concrete polish tasks and production-safe implementation.
author: Volt Team
template:
Upgrade {{surface}} to premium SaaS quality without breaking behavior.

Requirements:
1. Audit current UI and identify top 7 visual/interaction quality issues.
2. Pick top 3 highest-impact fixes and implement them.
3. Improve spacing rhythm, hierarchy, and action clarity.
4. Ensure desktop + mobile responsiveness.
5. Keep accessibility and performance intact.

Output:
- Audit findings (ranked)
- What changed and why
- Files touched
- Quick before/after summary

title: UX Audit + Fix Plan
description: Deep UX audit with prioritized fixes and immediate implementation of top issues.
author: Volt Team
template:
Run a UX audit for {{feature_or_page}} and implement improvements.

Do:
1. Find top 10 UX issues (clarity, navigation, feedback, friction, recoverability).
2. Rank by impact x effort.
3. Implement top {{top_n}} fixes immediately.
4. Add verification notes for each fix.

Return:
- Ranked issue table
- Implemented fixes
- Remaining backlog
